name: azure-openai-image-gen-skill
description: Generate, edit, and troubleshoot image generation through Azure OpenAI and Microsoft Foundry deployments.

interface.shortDescription: Generate images through Azure OpenAI deployments
interface.longDescription: Use Azure OpenAI Image Gen to route image generation and edit requests through Azure OpenAI or Microsoft Foundry deployments, including deployment-based endpoints, base64 image outputs, reference images, and local helper-script workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Azure OpenAI Image Gen to create an image through my Azure deployment.
Edit these reference images with Azure OpenAI Image Gen.
Help troubleshoot an Azure image generation API error.
